name: Majesty Maiden, the True Dracocaster
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>導</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>マジェスティ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>メイデン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Majesty Maiden, the True Dragon Mage
desc: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute a Continuous Spell/Trap you control, instead of a monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can add 1 "True Draco" or "True King" monster from your Deck to your hand.
mnst_eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute a Continuous Spell/Trap you control, instead of a monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can add 1 "True Draco" or "True King" monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute a Continuous Spell/Trap you control, instead of a monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can add 1 "True Draco" or "True King" monster from your Deck to your hand.

summoning: Uses Spell/Trap Cards as Tributes for Normal Summon
